supporting_quote: MECP2 mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®.
notes: Ionis. HepG2 primary screen (RTS4253) normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. GAPDH appears only for in-vivo mouse western-blot protein normalization; cyclophilin A only in generic general-methods boilerplate (either/or). Neither applies to the HepG2 mRNA data.

supporting_quote: AR mRNA levels were adjusted according to total RNA content, as measured by RIBOGREEN®.
notes: Ionis. HuVEC primary screen, quantitative real-time PCR with primer-probe set RTS3559. Normalized to total RNA via RIBOGREEN. GAPDH used only as housekeeping gene for protein (western blot) normalization in prostate cell lines (LNCaP/C4-2/VCaP), not for the HuVEC mRNA data.
